nodes.name: entity-vocab.json
nodes.summary: Committed seed cross-corpus entity vocabulary (a JSON array of project domain terms like KPO, XCom, triggerer) loaded by vocabulary.py and merged into the two-pass corpus scan so these terms are recognised as entities across all documents.
nodes.languageNotes: A flat JSON string array (not an object); load_vocabulary sorts and dedupes it on read.

nodes.name: field_directions.yaml
nodes.summary: Dependency-direction map that routes a document table's field name (after header_norm normalisation) to either Section.exposes or Section.depends_on during enrichment; loaded by direction.load_field_directions and seeded from the eval-corpus field vocabulary.
nodes.languageNotes: Two top-level keys (exposes / depends_on), each a list of natural-language field names; matching is name-based, never inferred from column position.

nodes.name: taxonomy.json
nodes.summary: Committed SAD-template taxonomy mapping each known section heading (definitions, quality attribute, solution components, stakeholder) to its canonical field list and table orientation (wide vs key_value); loaded by doc_router.load_taxonomy to drive structural inventory extraction.
nodes.languageNotes: Canonical JSON keyed by normalised section heading; each entry carries fields[] and an orientation discriminator consumed by the inventory extractors.
